title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Robin, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Brook as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haha... If that's how you feel, then why not?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go ahead and show me how to do this palm thing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: in retro-spect, it's already . . . . . . . . . . Come in handy a few times.*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotta hope in on your opponent's core!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is going to be your Trump card, Robin- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You just need to use your palms.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's a secret fishman karate tech- nique!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You maggot!! You put out the fire!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be a devil if that's what it takes..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get away!! What the hell is that form?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You may as well not have limbs, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No!! I wasn't talking about me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What was that sound just now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't see with all this ice in the way!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Black Maria- Sama!! Did something happen?!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Thanks for lining up like that-) Yohoho!!_3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Now, without further ado! phrase D'armes...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
